scripts.build:mobile:student: node scripts/patch-capacitor-app.cjs student && cross-env VITE_APP_VARIANT=student vite build --mode mobile.student --base ./ && npx cap sync
scripts.build:mobile:parent: node scripts/patch-capacitor-app.cjs parent && cross-env VITE_APP_VARIANT=parent vite build --base ./ && npx cap sync
scripts.build:mobile:faculty: node scripts/patch-capacitor-app.cjs faculty && cross-env VITE_APP_VARIANT=faculty vite build --base ./ && npx cap sync
scripts.build:mobile:universal: node scripts/patch-capacitor-app.cjs universal && cross-env VITE_APP_VARIANT=universal vite build --mode mobile.universal --base ./ && npx cap sync
scripts.rebuild:student: node scripts/patch-capacitor-app.cjs student && cross-env VITE_APP_VARIANT=student vite build --mode mobile.student --base ./ && npx cap sync android
